description: Phase 2. Research synthesized at parent 019/research/research.md §11. README.md rewrite in marketing voice: mimic Public root README + system-spec-kit README problem-first arc (OVERVIEW hook -> solution -> stats -> QUICK START -> FEATURES -> CONFIGURATION -> FAQ -> RELATED). Per D1, accept resemblance to exemplars; do not enforce strict HVR pass-bar. Avoid the 3 worst-case carries per research §6.4: semicolons in technical sentences, Oxford commas in lists, em dashes for emphasis. Use periods, commas, and parentheses instead.
